description: Vertical card from the White House. The darkened background photo shows a handcuffed Black man in a black graphic T-shirt (a print reading 'FUTURE DRIVE IN YOUR COUNTRY') being escorted by officers down a corridor or loading area. Inset over it, in a white rounded frame with a drop shadow, is a booking photo of the same man against a cinderblock wall with a partial red 'M'. Across the lower-middle is a red rectangle with white sans-serif capitals: 'ARRESTED.' Below, in white sans-serif capitals, the headline reads: 'Illegal Alien Violently Kills Innocent Mother Outside Gas Station in Florida.' The 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark with building icon is centered at the bottom. The tweet names the man as Rolbert Joachin, an 'illegal alien released into the U.S. under Biden.'
notable_text: ARRESTED. Illegal Alien Violently Kills Innocent Mother Outside Gas Station in Florida.
